resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-list
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail list inboxes
resourceTemplates.description: List AgentMail inboxes. Optional pagination uses limit and page_token.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get inbox
resourceTemplates.description: Get a single AgentMail inbox by inbox_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-pods-inboxes-list
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail list pod inboxes
resourceTemplates.description: List AgentMail inboxes for a pod with optional pagination.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-pods-inboxes-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get pod inbox
resourceTemplates.description: Get a single AgentMail inbox by pod_id and inbox_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-drafts-list
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail list drafts
resourceTemplates.description: List AgentMail drafts with optional labels, time range, sort order, and pagination filters.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-drafts-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get draft
resourceTemplates.description: Get an AgentMail draft by draft_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-drafts-list
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail list inbox drafts
resourceTemplates.description: List drafts in an AgentMail inbox with optional labels, time range, sort order, and pagination filters.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-drafts-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get inbox draft
resourceTemplates.description: Get a draft by inbox_id and draft_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-messages-list
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail list inbox messages
resourceTemplates.description: List messages in an AgentMail inbox with optional labels, time range, sort order, spam inclusion, and pagination filters.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-messages-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get inbox message
resourceTemplates.description: Get a message by inbox_id and message_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-messages-attachment-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get message attachment
resourceTemplates.description: Get an attachment download descriptor by inbox_id, message_id, and attachment_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-messages-raw-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get raw message
resourceTemplates.description: Get the raw message by inbox_id and message_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-threads-list
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail list inbox threads
resourceTemplates.description: List threads in an AgentMail inbox with optional labels, time range, sort order, spam inclusion, and pagination filters.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-threads-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get inbox thread
resourceTemplates.description: Get a thread by inbox_id and thread_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-threads-attachment-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get thread attachment
resourceTemplates.description: Get an attachment download descriptor by inbox_id, thread_id, and attachment_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-threads-list
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail list threads
resourceTemplates.description: List AgentMail threads across inboxes with optional filters and pagination.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-threads-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get thread
resourceTemplates.description: Get an AgentMail thread by thread_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-threads-attachment-get
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail get thread attachment
resourceTemplates.description: Get a thread attachment download descriptor by thread_id and attachment_id.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-inboxes-metrics-list
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail list inbox metrics
resourceTemplates.description: List message metrics for an inbox over a required time range with optional event type filters.

resourceTemplates.name: agentmail-api-keys-list
resourceTemplates.title: AgentMail list API keys
resourceTemplates.description: List AgentMail API keys with optional pagination.
